MWCapture SDK  3.3.1.1556
  • Home
  • Development Library
  • Examples
  • Release Notes
OSDPreview C++

The features are as follows

  1. capturing and rendering video using Pro Capture Family Functions.
  2. add OSD, including watermark, bullet screens (danmu, commentary subtitles), time, icons and frames in previewed video.

Folder dir: SDKv3\Examples\VC++\GUI\OSDPreview

Supported Hardware

Pro Capture Family

Features

  1. Preview captured videos.
  2. Add OSD, including time, icons and frames.
  3. Switch capture channel mid-stream.

Workflow

The main thread:
  1. To initialize and enumerate all available devices, call: MWCaptureInitInstance, MWGetChannelCount
  2. To create a renderer to process captured video, call: MWDXRender
  3. To find the valid capture device and add them to the application drop list, call: MWGetChannelInfoByIndex
  4. To find the valid capture device and add them to the application drop list, call: MWGetDevicePath, MWOpenChannelByPath
  5. Create a video process thread.
  6. Enter the main thread.
  7. To free up system resources and memory after exiting the capture application, call: MWCloseChannel and MWCaptureExitInstance
The video capture thread:
  1. To create an OSD image, call: MWCreateImage
  2. To start video capture, call: MWStartVideoCapture
  3. To register a timer, call: MWRegisterTimer
  4. To upload the OSD image, call: MWUploadImageFromVirtualAddress
  5. To set a timer to trigger video capture, call: MWScheduleTimer, MWCaptureVideoFrameToVirtualAddress
  6. To get current capture status, and clear the memory of capture card, call: MWGetVideoCaptureStatus
  7. Render captured videos.

Flow Chart

OSD Preview
